statement: Zone commutator generator J=i[D_W,A_W] is G-Hermitian (canonical part-size inner product G=diag(9,11,13)) with spectrum {0,+-2sqrt710}
admissible_class: i[D_W,W], W frozen zone-label weight on ran(A)
symmetry_group: Aut_raw acts trivially on the 3-dim quotient (part sizes distinct)
gauge_relation: global phase only; convention A_W vs A_W^T both symmetrize to n_i n_j (resolved by G)
negative_control: diagonal-only adjacency -> comm=0; naive Euclidean G=I not Hermitian
reason_for_status: Hermiticity gate met in the canonical frozen part-size inner product; projectors genuinely G-orthogonal

statement: ran(A)=neutral(1)+active(2) via G-orthogonal spectral projectors P0,Pact of J
exact_formula_or_theorem: P0+Pact=I; (G*Pact)^T=G*Pact; tr Pact=2, tr P0=1; neutral vec (143,-234,99)
admissible_class: spectral projectors of J (polynomials in J)
symmetry_group: trivial (canonical eigenspaces of a fixed frozen operator)
gauge_relation: unique orthogonal projectors of a G-Hermitian operator
reason_for_status: orthogonal (not oblique) once G is used; FIREWALL: not a physical neutral current/neutrino/charge
true block-determinant identity; NOT an energy-pressure tensor

statement: Branch CP readout is not unique: commutant wider than C*I; same marginals, different coherence
negative_control: two admissible readouts share frozen marginals yet differ
reason_for_status: branch symmetry leaves a family; needs PRIM-BRANCH-ISOTROPIC-READOUT

statement: Lepton mass ratios underdetermined by branch exponents {0,1/4,1/3}
exact_formula_or_theorem: Vandermonde det at {0,1/4,1/3}=1/144!=0 -> any (r_mu,r_tau) realized by a smooth m(p)
admissible_class: smooth positive matching functions on the 3 exponents
negative_control: explicit quadratic interpolants for two distinct target pairs
reason_for_status: exponents impose no constraint on ratios; needs PRIM-EFT-IR-MATCHING-FUNCTIONAL

statement: Physical equation of state w=p/rho not determined by two-source response
exact_formula_or_theorem: (rho,p)=(3,1) and (1,3): same total 4, distinct w (1/3 vs 3)
negative_control: two inequivalent (rho,p) with identical response, distinct w
reason_for_status: response fixes only the total; needs PRIM-PHASON-PRESSURE-ENERGY-ROLE-ASSIGNMENT; no rho=e^u-1,p=e^u/phi
book_patch: Book08: keep internal-scale vs physical w(z) separate

statement: Physical edge cover is a 1-parameter holonomy family in lambda
exact_formula_or_theorem: edge dim 359; z^3 coeff of (1-lz^4)(1-lz^3) = -lambda; lambda not fixed by frozen data
negative_control: lambda=1 vs 2 give different cover observables; arbitrary unitary breaks source-derivation
reason_for_status: lambda unfixed; needs PRIM-EDGE-HOLONOMY-SELECTOR; Halmos existence != uniqueness

statement: Golden substitution sigma(a)=ab,sigma(b)=a is a valid refinement tower (Perron phi)
exact_formula_or_theorem: incidence [[1,1],[1,0]]: det=-1, trace=1, charpoly t^2-t-1, phi^2=phi+1
negative_control: Sturmian data removed -> downgrade to conditional
reason_for_status: valid extension; identifying with archive maps needs PRIM-STURMIAN-REFINEMENT-OWNER; no CFT import

statement: Archive bonding map is not a regular (measure-preserving) cover
negative_control: actual archive map (window 359/160) vs constant-fibre regular cover
reason_for_status: archive map is contracting, not regular; do not substitute a regular cover

statement: Present-core limits (heat-trace no pole, alpha blocked, c_D0!=c, internal flow != w(z), passports) unchanged
admissible_class: each named owner's full admissible class
